creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
Please wait until AFTER
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/122555
is committed.

Note repo copy asks for multiple new locations.

Very soon APR will have lots of APIs
0.9.x
1.0.x
1.1.x
1.2.x
1.3.x [release is immiment]

This work will be incorporated into bsd.apacheNG
to implement USE_APR=yes [but rather, a version]

Afterwards, I'll chase the update in other ports to depend on devel/apr12.
